title: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

options.title: Immerse
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take [red]3[/red] [red]unblockable, unpowered[/red] damage.

options.title: Linger
options.description: Gain [green]2[/green] Max HP. Take escalating [red]unblockable, unpowered[/red] damage (starts at [red]4[/red] on first linger, increases by 1 each subsequent linger).

options.title: Exit Baths
options.description: The heat finally gets to you, and you hop out of the bath.

notes: [gold]Immerse[/gold] locks you into a repeating loop of increasingly dangerous choices. [gold]Abstain[/gold] is available only on the initial choice and immediately ends the event after healing [green]10 HP[/green]. Once you [gold]Immerse[/gold], each subsequent [gold]Linger[/gold] action grants [green]2 Max HP[/green] but deals escalating [red]unblockable, unpowered[/red] damage: [red]3[/red], [red]4[/red], [red]5[/red], [red]6[/red]... (increasing by 1 each time). Net HP cost = damage minus max HP gain, so: 1 HP, 2 HP, 3 HP, etc. The page descriptions escalate dramatically through 9 linger stages: desperate (LINGER1-3), frantic (LINGER4), then surreal and dissociative (LINGER5-9). When the next [gold]Linger[/gold] would kill you, a [sine][red]death warning[/red][/sine] page appears instead, offering a last chance to [gold]Exit Baths[/gold] safely. You can still choose to [gold]Linger[/gold] from the death warning (which kills you) or exit safely.
